development/visual-tests.title: Visual regression tests
development/visual-tests.description: Apollon's visual regression tests run as part of pr-health-checks.yml on every PR. They use Playwright with the mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-noble Docker image so snapshots are pinned to one Linux rendering stack regardless of contributor OS.
